context.role: Player character default running state during active gameplay
context.usage_scenario: Continuously displayed during active gameplay when player is on ground and not ducking

visual_specification.shape: T-Rex dinosaur in running pose with alternating leg positions

animation.description: Frame 1: left leg forward, right leg back. Frame 2: right leg forward, left leg back. Seamless loop creating running motion

visual_specification.details: T-Rex with legs in running motion, body upright, tail extended for balance, eyes open

relationships.shared_with: Same body shape as player_idle, same size as player_jump and player_dead
relationships.differences_from: player_idle has no leg movement, player_jump has both feet off ground, player_duck has lowered body and different dimensions (118x60px)

explicit_negations: no motion blur or speed lines
no dust particles or environmental effects
